turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Good morning. Yes, I would like to order a coffee, but I do not know which one sounds good. Do you have any recommendation for me?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Good morning! Absolutely, I’d be happy to help. If you’re in the mood for something classic, a latte or a cappuccino is always a great choice. Or if you’d like something a bit sweeter, a caramel macchiato could be lovely. Let me know what you’re in the mood for!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Caramel macchiato sounds lovely, can I have one, please? Is it possible to add lactose-free milk?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course! I’ll make sure to prepare your caramel macchiato with lactose-free milk. That’ll be no problem at all. Is there anything else you’d like to add or any other preferences?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yes, I would like to take a breakfast, but I don't know what to take. Hm…I think I will go with eggs and toast.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That sounds great! I’ll get that eggs on toast ready for you. If you’d like to add anything else, like some sides or a drink, just let me know!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Transcript Unavailable

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, I’ll add two hash browns and a side salad to your order as well. That’ll make a delicious and balanced breakfast! If there's anything else you’d like, just let me know!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Can I get an orange juice too, please?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course! I’ll add a fresh orange juice to your order as well. That’s going to be a perfect combination. If there's anything else you need, just let me know!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Here is their student discount.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, we do offer a student discount! Just let us know your student ID when you’re ready to pay, and we’ll apply the discount for you. Anything else I can help you with?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Ah yes, I would like to know the percentages of the discounts, please.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! Typically, our student discount is about 10% off the total bill. If there are any special promotions, we’ll let you know at the time as well. Just bring your ID, and we’ll take care of the rest!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Thank you. I would like to know how much all of that would that be.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course! Let me quickly tally everything up for you. We have the caramel macchiato with lactose-free milk, the eggs on toast with two hash browns, a side salad, an orange juice, and the student discount applied. I’ll calculate the total and let you know right away!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Sure thing, I can't wait.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Thank you for your patience! So, after applying the discount, your total comes to about $18.50. If that works for you, I’ll get everything ready and bring it right over!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Everything is perfect. Thank you very much for your service.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You're very welcome! I'm so glad everything’s perfect. If you need anything else at all, just let me know. Enjoy your meal!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Thank you very much.”
